concept: How about a game where I play as a nature spirit who can possess and control different plants to solve puzzles and defend a sacred forest? As a vine, I can create bridges and swing across gaps; as a mushroom, I can release spores that affect nearby creatures; as a tree, I can move branches to create paths or barriers. Human developers are cutting down the forest section by section, forcing me to adapt to shrinking environments with fewer plant options. My connection with the forest grows stronger as its size diminishes, eventually allowing transformation into legendary plant forms thought to be extinct.
